subject: Swift BAT trigger 1500295: A solar flare
body:
C. Gronwall (PSU), R. Gupta (NASA GSFC) and A. Y. Lien (U Tampa)
report on behalf of the Neil Gehrels Swift Observatory Team:

BAT trigger 1500295 is not a GRB, but was caused by a solar flare.

Swift's automatic slews are currently disabled, so there will be no XRT or UVOT data for this trigger.
